# Open Configurator

> Open-source ecommerce + product configuration platform. Build, customize, price, and sell custom products with AI-assisted configuration, multi-agent orchestration, subscriptions, advanced inventory, and a full email campaign system.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the configurator platform.
- [Features](/features): Capabilities including AI agents, 3D visualization, dynamic pricing, email campaigns, and analytics.
- [Products](/products): Browse and configure available products.
- [Cart](/cart): Shopping cart and checkout entry point.

## Account

- [Sign in](/auth): Account access for saved configurations, orders, and subscriptions.
- [Profile](/profile): Profile, preferences, and email subscription settings (auth required).
- [Wishlist](/wishlist): Saved products and configurations (auth required).
- [Customer Portal](/customer-portal): Subscription plans, invoices, payment methods, and usage (auth required).

## Notes

- Admin pages live under `/admin/*` and require an admin role (disallowed for crawlers).
- Shareable configuration links are served from `/shared/:token`.
